Home / Service Areas / Schertz

Fencing in Schertz, TX

Trusted local professionals serving Schertz and surrounding communities

Serving Schertz, TX

Summit Fencing provides reliable fencing solutions for Schertz, TX, a growing community with many military families stationed near Randolph AFB. We understand the need for secure, low-maintenance fencing options that accommodate busy lifestyles. Our vinyl and aluminum fences are popular choices for Schertz residents, offering both durability and aesthetic appeal. The hot summers here can be tough on outdoor structures, but our materials are designed to withstand extreme temperatures without compromising on looks. Whether you need a fence for privacy, safety, or simply to enhance your home's exterior, we've got you covered.

Schertz is a family-friendly city with strong ties to the military and a rapidly expanding suburban landscape.

Fencing Services in Schertz

Cedar Privacy Fences

Natural wood fencing that withstands San Antonio's humidity without warping.

Learn more →

Wrought Iron Gates

Ornamental security gates combining Spanish colonial style with modern safety.

Learn more →

Security Chain Link

Commercial-grade barriers that blend into residential areas near military bases.

Learn more →

Vinyl Fencing

Low-maintenance alternative that resists fading in intense Texas sun.

Learn more →

Ranch Fencing

Working fences for Hill Country properties with livestock and wildlife.

Learn more →

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout Schertz and the surrounding area.
